title: L4D1 Louis Warden
description: The Warden seems to have a new, positive outlook. Being positive got him where he is.
body:
The Warden is a pretty spooky mob. The alien-like appearance makes you believe it came from a mod. But what if it was something more positive? This pack aims to change your outlook on the Warden by giving it the look and feel of Louis from the original Left 4 Dead!

It comes with a custom Warden texture, using a Louis player skin and stretched to fit the model, as well as custom sounds. This pack has more sounds than with the default Warden, and the Sculk Shrieker sound is changed as well, just to add to the atmosphere.

Subtitles are modified appropriately to use "Louis" in place of "Warden."
